preReview.title: ​Philadelphia Union v FC Cincinnati: Carnell wants to entertain on home debut
preReview.description: Bradley Carnell's Philadelphia Union reign began with a fine win over Orlando City, and they host FC Cincinnati in Saturday's home opener.
